title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
